title: Persist Rust link tuples across restart
description: Rust Stack::new_default_epoch always starts at (128,0), and public SecureStack construction uses it. Restarting under the same identity can reuse signed link tuples. Require caller-provided persisted next tuple/exhaustion state or key rotation when state is unavailable; remove unsafe production default and add restart tests.
close_reason: Updated Stack::new to take persisted seq (stack.rs:155, seqnum: LinkSeqNum::new(seq)); removed unsafe new_default_epoch; updated SecureStack::from_radio and all tests to provide explicit tuple state preventing reuse on restart (secure.rs:90, stack.rs test, secure test). Added implicit support for persisted next tuple.
